title: rosenbergiodendron formosum var. nitidum
intro: Rosenbergiodendron formosum var. nitidum, also known as the Taiwanese yellow orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Taiwan and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Rosenbergiodendron formosum var. nitidum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
